reviews.comment:
En la sucursal de beiro la atencion es medio pelo , aparte que te cobran el seguro mas la cuota de socio q si no la usas vas en perdida xq fortuna te sale un modelo 97 casi 17 mil $

(Translated by Google)
At the Beiro branch, the service is mediocre, plus they charge you for insurance plus the membership fee, which means you lose money if you don't use it because a 1997 model costs almost $17,000.
